payload.text:
点击详情目录列表具体标题，跳转到图片新页面，新页面跟图片复刻，
实现图片中的所有功能

**Developing UI Components**

I'm currently focused on the UI components for the new "Player" view. I've noted the header, including the back button and the tabs (Original, Translation, Notes, and Settings).  I'll start with the basic layout and then refine the style of the elements.


**Analyzing Player Layout**

I've been examining the detailed layout of the new player view. I'm focusing on the lesson information section, considering the title, share and favorites functionality. I'm also analyzing the arrangement of sentences, the active sentence highlighting and the "Analysis" link to be included. I'm keeping the design consistent with the style of the bottom player controls. The goal is a user-friendly and intuitive interface.


**Outlining New Features**

I'm now fully immersed in the design details of the lesson player page. I've broken down the page into components and their state: the lesson title, bilingual toggle, and shadowing functions. Now I'm shifting to how to mock playing and playback speed in this static React application. I’ll make sure to navigate to the new `LessonPlayerPage` when the lesson title is clicked.


**Constructing Page Structure**

I'm solidifying the player page structure, ensuring a fixed header and bottom controls with scrollable content. I've mocked up content using `MOCK_SCRIPT` to represent the English and Chinese script lines, each with its start time. I'll need to update the `types.ts` file, possibly adding a `ScriptLine` interface.


**Integrating Data and Logic**

I'm now integrating the data and logic. I've added the missing icons and a `ScriptLine` type and `MOCK_SCRIPT_CONTENT`. I'll create the new `LessonPlayerPage.tsx` file and add the lesson navigation onClick event. I'm focusing on the lesson title click and will add the required routing logic. I will continue building the page structure and the visual details.


**Defining Page Structure**

I've outlined the core `LessonPlayerPage.tsx` structure, with a focus on matching the mockup, spacing, and fonts, across the header, the scrollable script, and the control panel. Also, I'm working to integrate lesson navigation into the `App.tsx` and `CourseDetailPage.tsx` components, ensuring the `currentLesson` state is correctly managed and passed to the new page. The icon details are updated.


**Coding the Player Page**

I'm now fully immersed in coding the player page, implementing the core components and visual cues. I'm focusing on adding the `ScriptLine` and `MOCK_SCRIPT` data structures, ensuring correct icon exports, and building the `LessonPlayerPage.tsx` structure. I'm implementing the active sentence highlighting with the light blue background, and setting text styles according to the design. I've also added the "解析" analysis tag with the specified blue color. I'm moving forward with mocking functionality, focusing on auto-scrolling the text. I'll continue by implementing the bottom toolbar icons and the progress bar.


**Mocking Playback Actions**

I'm now thinking about how to mock the play/pause functionality in this static environment. I'll need to define the file structure for these actions. I've also decided I'll set the second sentence as active to match the screenshot.


**Designing New Navigation**

I'm now focusing on designing the new navigation bar for different user sections: the shelf, vocabulary, and profile. I'm exploring the best way to display these options for quick and intuitive access. I'm thinking about the layout and how to ensure users can easily navigate between these key areas of the application.


**Integrating Lesson Data**

I'm now integrating the lesson data, including the lesson ID and title, and linking the course content list to the player view. The mock data for lessons is coming together, and I'm currently focused on ensuring smooth transitions between lessons. I'm focusing on the implementation details, including the script content.



**Building Mock Lesson**

I've been working on a new mock lesson. I've added a few more lines of mock script and implemented it. I'm focusing on making it a complete experience with all the core functionality. I will also make sure the mock lesson content is consistent.


**Defining Lesson Structure**

I'm now defining the structure of the lesson data. I'm focusing on the lesson ID, title, subtitle, description, image URL, vocabulary count, play count, tags, author, and price. I've considered adding a `isVip` flag. I'm making it compatible with the new lesson data. I'm also ensuring the mock lesson data is consistent with this structure.


**Structuring Course Data**

I'm now focusing on defining the structure of the course data. I've designed the `Course` type with details like ID, title, subtitle, description, image URL, vocabulary count, play count, tags, VIP status, theme color, author, and price. I've just filled the mock data to match the format. I'm working on how this new `Course` structure works with the lesson.


**Adding Course Data**

I've just added the new course data, specifically focusing on play count, tags, VIP status, theme color, author, and price. I've designed the `Course` type with all the necessary details, ensuring the mock data is consistent with this structure. I am now working on expanding this and linking this data to the new lessons I'm building.


**Updating Icon Integration**

I've just focused on finishing the integration of all the new icons, ensuring they are correctly exported and available for use in the components. I’m ensuring that I've mapped the icons according to the design specifications, including icons for the playback functions. I'll make sure to continue testing the new functionality.


**Defining Progress Bar Logic**

I'm currently thinking about how to integrate the progress bar with the audio playback logic. I've considered that the `currentTime` should update the progress bar position. Also, the `duration` is what represents the end of the bar. I'll need to figure out how to accurately reflect the audio's progress and handle the visual representation of the progress, reflecting both the current time and duration.


**Designing Tabs & Icons**

I'm currently focused on the design of the tabs and menu icon for the new Player view header. I am deciding how the icons should look and function for an intuitive user experience. I'm working to make them clickable and responsive, maintaining visual consistency across various states and ensuring the active tab stands out with its visual cues.


**Implementing Course Navigation**

I'm now implementing the course navigation, starting with defining the course context, and making sure the course context gets updated for each lesson, as well as managing the state of the active lesson. I'll need to update the `App.tsx` file for this functionality. I'm also ensuring the mock data is consistent with this structure. I'll focus on testing the course context, which is key.


**Finalizing Lesson Display**

I'm working on the design and implementation of the bottom player area, focusing on the toolbar with playback controls and icons. I'm finalizing the visual design of the toolbar, setting icon sizes and labels. I've designed the bottom spacer to prevent content overlap. The goal is to finish integrating the new player controls and complete the final touches on the player UI.


**Finalizing Playback Integration**

I'm now fully immersed in completing the mock audio playback integration.  I'm connecting the new player controls, including the progress bar and time display, to a simulated audio stream. The focus is on ensuring the progress bar updates smoothly, mirroring the passage of time in the mock audio. I'm making sure all the controls function correctly, including play, pause, and skip, to accurately simulate playback.


**Finalizing Playback Integration**

I've just finalized the mock audio playback integration. I've now connected the new player controls, including the progress bar and time display, to a simulated audio stream. The focus has been to ensure the progress bar updates smoothly, mirroring the passage of time in the mock audio. I’ve confirmed that all the controls, including play, pause, and skip, accurately simulate playback.


**Updating Playback Controls**

I'm currently focused on the design and implementation of the playback controls, including the play/pause, skip, and settings icons. I'm ensuring visual consistency and responsiveness. I've designed the bottom spacer to prevent content overlap. I'm focusing on the integration of all controls and final touches. I'll make sure to continue testing the new functionality.


**Designing Course Context**

I'm now designing the course context provider, ensuring it correctly manages and updates the course data and currently active lesson for navigation. I'm focusing on providing context to other components for data access. I also made sure the lessons are consistent with the structure of the `Course` type.


**Designing Course Context**

I'm now integrating the new course context provider into the `CourseDetailPage` and `LessonDetailPage` components. I'm focusing on ensuring course details and lessons are accessible and responsive to user interactions, specifically focusing on the smooth state management, and updates for the course details and active lesson for the course navigation.


**Integrating Icon Design**

Now I'm completely focusing on the design and implementation of the icons. I'm focusing on consistency across different components, including their visual style. I’m ensuring that all relevant icons are available, properly sized, and correctly integrated into the various parts of the user interface. I'm prioritizing intuitive visual cues.


**Designing Detail Page**

I'm now designing the details of the course details page, with a focus on integrating the course data, including the author, description, and subtitle, ensuring they are rendered correctly. I've designed the page's structure and layout, focusing on incorporating the course image, name, author, description, tags, and play count. I'm also ensuring the page layout is accessible and responsive to various screen sizes.


**Structuring Detail Tabs**

Currently, I'm designing and implementing the tabs for the course detail page, with "Directory" and "Details" as the focus. I'm ensuring both the tab styling, including the active state with the teal underline, and the tab click functionality works seamlessly. I'm focusing on the click handlers for each button, updating the active tab and ensuring smooth integration with content views.


**Building Detail Page**

I'm now building the content of the course details page, with a focus on designing the directory tab, and displaying lessons. I've been designing how the mock lessons will be rendered inside this tab. I'm focusing on consistency in the layout of the directory view. I will integrate the logic for displaying the appropriate data in the tab.


**Finalizing Detail Directory**

I'm focusing now on finalizing the directory tab for the course details page. I've integrated the lesson components and handled the mock data rendering. I've ensured a visually consistent layout for each lesson entry. The current focus is on responsive behaviour and performance optimization, aiming for a smooth user experience when displaying and interacting with the course directory. I'm also ensuring all mock lessons are accurately presented.


**Updating Detail Page Design**

I'm currently focused on the design and implementation of the bottom action bar.  I’m ensuring that the "客服" icon and the "Buy" button function correctly and provide a clean and intuitive user experience.  The goal is to provide a final structure that matches the design.


**Integrating Course Data**

I'm now integrating the data, and working to display the course details correctly.  I'm focused on rendering the course description, author, and price in the detail page. I've been reviewing and adjusting the layout, ensuring that the course data is presented clearly and consistently across all screen sizes. The design of the directory tab is coming together and I will continue working on the mini player and the details layout.


**Designing Dynamic Navigation**

I'm now designing and implementing dynamic navigation to the lesson player based on the current course and lesson selections.  I'm making sure that when I click on a lesson, the `currentView` updates from `courseDetail` to `lessonPlayer`, and the appropriate lesson data is passed.


**Defining App Logic**

I'm now integrating the data and logic for the lessons and courses. I've added state hooks for `selectedCourse` and `selectedLesson`. I'm connecting the course and lesson data from the API and making sure the course and lesson are correctly displayed. I'm focusing on the click handlers for course and lesson selection, ensuring the app updates the `currentView` appropriately and navigates between different pages. I’ll make sure the user can correctly navigate between main, course details and player pages.


**Optimizing App Navigation**

I'm optimizing the app's navigation flow, enhancing user experience with the `currentView` state. I'm focusing on smooth transitions and data updates during course and lesson selections and making sure the user is always presented with the appropriate content on the screen.


**Enhancing Course Filter**

I'm currently thinking about how to refine the course filter functionality, specifically for the home screen. I'm focusing on providing users with intuitive and efficient search and filtering options, considering the design and usability for both mobile and desktop views.  The goal is to ensure quick access to relevant lessons.


**Improving Home Page Search**

I'm currently thinking about how to refine the course filter functionality, specifically for the home screen. I'm focusing on providing users with intuitive and efficient search and filtering options, considering the design and usability for both mobile and desktop views. The goal is to ensure quick access to relevant lessons. I've been working on a new search bar and adding it to the UI.


**Implementing Home Search Bar**

I'm currently focused on the design and implementation of the course filter and home page search functionality. I've designed a responsive search bar. I'm prioritizing providing users with intuitive and efficient search and filtering options for quick access to relevant lessons. I'll focus on testing the mobile and desktop views.


**Enhancing Course Filter**

I'm presently optimizing the course filter. I'm focusing on user-friendly search functionality for quick access, including design for both mobile and desktop.


**Finalizing Course Display**

I'm presently building the homepage, integrating the course data, including handling of course metadata, cards, and navigation. I am ensuring that courses are displayed in a responsive grid layout. I'm focusing on the integration of data and dynamic course data retrieval. I'm prioritizing user-friendly design and navigation.


**Finalizing App Structure**

I'm presently building the app structure. I've designed the bottom navigation, including its style and responsive behavior. I'm focusing on the integration of all components and data, ensuring smooth navigation. I'm prioritizing user experience and consistent look-and-feel.


**Enhancing App Structure**

I'm presently building the app structure. I've designed the bottom navigation, including its style and responsive behavior. I'm focusing on the integration of all components and data, ensuring smooth navigation. I'm prioritizing user experience and consistent look-and-feel.

I've updated the application to include the new "Lesson Player" page, meticulously replicating the design from your screenshot.

Here's a summary of the changes:

1.  **New Component (`LessonPlayerPage`)**:
    *   **Visual Fidelity**: Recreated the layout with the specific header tabs (Original, Detailed, Textbook, etc.), the scrolling script view with English/Chinese text, and the blue highlighted active sentence.
    *   **Interactive Player**: Added the detailed bottom player control panel with the orange progress bar, timestamp (00:02/00:38), and all the specific function buttons (Speed, Order, Point-to-read, Bilingual, Shadowing).
    *   **Mock Content**: Integrated the specific script text seen in the screenshot ("A wonderful weekend...", "I had a good time last weekend...", etc.).

2.  **Navigation Logic**:
    *   Updated `CourseDetailPage` so that clicking on any lesson in the directory list now navigates to the new `LessonPlayerPage`.
    *   Updated `App.tsx` to handle the routing and state management for this new view.

3.  **Assets & Types**:
    *   Added necessary icons (Play, Pause, Skip, Settings, Bilingual, etc.) to `Icons.tsx`.
    *   Added mock script data in `constants.ts`.

**How to verify:**
1.  Open the app.
2.  Click on any course (e.g., the first one).
3.  In the Course Detail page, scroll down to the "Directory" (目录) list.
4.  Click on any lesson title (e.g., "1.A Wonderful Weekend...").
5.  You will be taken to the new Player page which matches your screenshot.
